org.bukkit.event.block.BlockDispenseEvent

Package Description
org.bukkit.event.block
Events relating to when a block is changed or interacts with the world.

  • Uses of BlockDispenseEvent in org.bukkit.event.block

    Subclasses of BlockDispenseEvent in org.bukkit.event.block 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  BlockDispenseArmorEvent
    Called when an equippable item is dispensed from a block and equipped on a nearby entity.
